response.original_title: Hitler's Society - Diaries of Nazi sympathizers, rivals, and victims
response.overview: May 8, 2025, marks the 80th anniversary of the end of World War II in Europe. The Allies defeated Nazi Germany, which had ruled for over 12 years. Diaries of fervent Nazis and opponents illuminate this era.  Eight people and their families are the focus of this four-part documentary series. In their diaries, they recorded their daily experiences under the Nazi regime, their feelings, and their thoughts. Animated scenes in the style of a graphic novel guide the viewer through the diary entries.
response.title: Hitler's Society - Diaries of Nazi sympathizers, rivals, and victims
